title: coleus calycinus
intro: Coleus calycinus is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as coleus or solenostemon. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Coleus calycinus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Coleus calycinus include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
